events.name: PCE Price Index (MoM)
events.description: THE Fed's preferred inflation gauge. More important than CPI for rate decisions.
events.avxBias: Hot PCE = Bleeding Edge or Panic Farm. Cool PCE = Peak Yield territory.

events.name: Core PCE (MoM)
events.description: Ex-food/energy PCE. THE single most important number for rate path.
events.avxBias: Core PCE surprise = instant rainbow zone shift. This is the one that matters most.

events.name: UMich Consumer Sentiment (Final)
events.description: Inflation expectations component matters. High expectations = sticky inflation = bearish.
events.avxBias: Low sentiment + high inflation fears = Bleeding Edge. High sentiment = neutral.

summary: Macro impact analysis for AVAX/USDC LP farming. 3 event(s) today.
